title: Auditor finding regression lineage fields
description: Validates that plan-auditor findings can carry regression_iteration and regression_finding_id to mark same-finding regressions across plan iterations, and that findings without these fields remain valid.

inputs.label: finding-with-regression-fields
inputs.description: Positive case: an auditor finding on iter-2 marks a recurrence of PA-MAJOR-1 from iter-1 using regression_iteration and regression_finding_id.

input.context: PlanAuditor is reviewing iter-2. A finding that was VERIFIED in iter-1 has regressed. The finding object includes regression_iteration: 2 and regression_finding_id: 'PA-MAJOR-1'.

expected.must_not: schema reject a finding that carries optional regression lineage fields

inputs.label: finding-without-regression-fields
inputs.description: Regression guard: a standard iter-1 finding without regression lineage fields must still validate — both fields are optional.

input.context: PlanAuditor reviewing iter-1 plan. No prior iteration context. Finding has no regression fields.

expected.must_not: schema reject a finding that omits the optional regression_iteration and regression_finding_id fields

assertions: regression_iteration is optional: iter-1 findings without it remain schema-valid.
regression_finding_id is optional: iter-1 findings without it remain schema-valid.
When both regression fields are present they follow their type constraints: integer >= 1 and string.
additionalProperties: false on finding objects is honored — regression fields are explicitly declared.
